name: Parcel Deck
description: Adds Parcel Deck shipment ingest and lookup tools to OpenClaw.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the Parcel Deck app, for example http://localhost:3010

sharedSecret.description: Shared secret used for Parcel Deck ingest authentication

defaultSource.description: Default shipment source attached when the ingest tool does not specify one

timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for Parcel Deck API requests in milliseconds
